---
title: "Lucian Blue Scher"
description: "Masters of Environmental Data Scientist (MEDS) student at the Bren school at UCSB"
image: images/grad_photo.jpeg
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 17em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucianbluescher
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/lucianbluescher
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:lucianscher@gmail.edu
      target: _blank
---

### Data science, communcations and outdoor adventures. 

This website is still under construction.
